contact.title: 📬 Contact
contact.heading: Get in touch.
contact.description: If you have a project in mind, a proposal, or just a question, feel free to reach out.

experience.bio1: I live in Buenos Aires, Argentina, I'm a frontend developer, graduated as a Computer Technician and currently studying a University Technician in Programming (UTN).
experience.bio2: I trained as a Fullstack Developer with Node.js at EducaciónIT, and since 2022 I've been working as a Frontend Developer at Leafnoise.
experience.expParagraph1: I participate in platform maintenance across various projects, developing bugfixes and designing and implementing features, with the opportunity to be part of diverse projects alongside my team.
experience.expParagraph2: In some cases, I attend meetings involving direct interaction with clients and other teams, where I also collaborate on defining the backend structure.
experience.expParagraph3: This allowed me to be part of building projects from scratch, which motivated me to create this portfolio to share my experience and keep growing as a developer.
experience.goalParagraph1: To be in constant personal and professional growth and development.
experience.goalParagraph2: To gain new experiences where I can contribute my knowledge and keep learning.
